parameters.subject: =🚨 Weather Update: {{ $json.weather[0].main }} detected in {{ $json.name }}
parameters.message:
=

📊 Complete Weather Data Report: {{ $json.name }} ({{ $json.id }})

📍 Location & System
- Coordinates: {{ $json.coord.lat }}, {{ $json.coord.lon }}
- Country: {{ $json.sys.country }}
- Timezone: {{ $json.timezone }}
- Base Station: {{ $json.base }}

☁️ Weather Condition
- Main: {{ $json.weather[0].main }}
- Description: {{ $json.weather[0].description }}
- Icon Code: {{ $json.weather[0].icon }}
- Cloudiness: {{ $json.clouds.all }}%

🌡️ Main Measurements
- Current Temp: {{ $json.main.temp }}°C
- Feels Like: {{ $json.main.feels_like }}°C
- Min/Max Temp: {{ $json.main.temp_min }}°C / {{ $json.main.temp_max }}°C
- Humidity: {{ $json.main.humidity }}%
- Pressure: {{ $json.main.pressure }} hPa
- Sea Level: {{ $json.main.sea_level }} hPa
- Ground Level: {{ $json.main.grnd_level }} hPa
- Visibility: {{ $json.visibility }}m

💨 Wind & Atmosphere
- Wind Speed: {{ $json.wind.speed }} m/s
- Wind Degree: {{ $json.wind.deg }}°
- Data Checked At: {{ new Date($json.dt * 1000).toLocaleString() }}

🌅 Sun Schedule (Manila Time)
- Sunrise: {{ new Date($json.sys.sunrise * 1000).toLocaleTimeString() }}
- Sunset: {{ new Date($json.sys.sunset * 1000).toLocaleTimeString() }}

✅ Metadata
- System ID: {{ $json.sys.id }} (Type {{ $json.sys.type }})
- Response Code (cod): {{ $json.cod }} (Success)
